untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-session/multi-venue position scaling logic with fractional exit rules (33% exit on +1.0x ASR, 67% rollover), session-boundary detection, and incremental re-entry across market sessions. These portfolio management and session-state features are not expressible in single-bar condition logic. The core momentum confirmation can be approximated with trend indicators, but the sophisticated scaling mechanics require a custom execution layer outside standard backtest rule syntax.
translation_notes: Approximated 'initial directional thesis with moderate conviction' using ADX > 25 (trend confirmation). Used price vs SMA_20 as directional bias. Exit conditions simplified to reversal logic rather than the complex session-based scaling. The signal's core value lies in its position management strategy (scaling in/out by percentage across multiple sessions), which cannot be fully captured in standard bar-by-bar rules. A custom scaling module would be needed to properly implement the 33%/67% split and session monitoring.
